'''korathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:weanable|weanable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weanable|weanable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| korathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:korathithi|korathithi]] || [[word:korathiji|korathiji]] || [[word:korathishi|korathishi]] || [[word:korathiki|korathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:korathuthuthu|korathuthuthu]] || [[word:korathujuju|korathujuju]] || [[word:korathushushu|korathushushu]] || [[word:korathukuku|korathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:korathuthu|korathuthu]] || [[word:korathuju|korathuju]] || [[word:korathushu|korathushu]] || [[word:korathuku|korathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:korathufthuf|korathufthuf]] || [[word:korathufjuf|korathufjuf]] || [[word:korathufshuf|korathufshuf]] || [[word:korathufkuf|korathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:korathethe|korathethe]] || [[word:koratheje|koratheje]] || [[word:koratheshe|koratheshe]] || [[word:koratheke|koratheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:korathothotho|korathothotho]] || [[word:korathojojo|korathojojo]] || [[word:korathoshosho|korathoshosho]] || [[word:korathokoko|korathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:korathotho|korathotho]] || [[word:korathojo|korathojo]] || [[word:korathosho|korathosho]] || [[word:korathoko|korathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:korathofthof|korathofthof]] || [[word:korathofjof|korathofjof]] || [[word:korathofshof|korathofshof]] || [[word:korathofkof|korathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:korathĂŻfthĂŻf|korathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfjĂŻf|korathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfshĂŻf|korathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfkĂŻf|korathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:korathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|korathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|korathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|korathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|korathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:korathĂŻfthĂŻf|korathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfjĂŻf|korathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfshĂŻf|korathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfkĂŻf|korathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:korathĂŻfthĂŻf|korathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfjĂŻf|korathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfshĂŻf|korathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:korathĂŻfkĂŻf|korathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:korathĂŠthĂŠ|korathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:korathĂŠjĂŠ|korathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:korathĂŠshĂŠ|korathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:korathĂŠkĂŠ|korathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:korathathatha|korathathatha]] || [[word:korathajaja|korathajaja]] || [[word:korathashasha|korathashasha]] || [[word:korathakaka|korathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:korathatha|korathatha]] || [[word:korathaja|korathaja]] || [[word:korathasha|korathasha]] || [[word:korathaka|korathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:korathafthaf|korathafthaf]] || [[word:korathafjaf|korathafjaf]] || [[word:korathafshaf|korathafshaf]] || [[word:korathafkaf|korathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:korathasha|korathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:korathshĂ«sha|korathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:korathrosha|korathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:korathmusha|korathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:korathyasha|korathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokorathnkshĂ«sha|gokorathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokorathnkrosha|gokorathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokorathnkmusha|gokorathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokorathnkyasha|gokorathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:korarathasha|korarathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:korarathshĂ«sha|korarathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:korarathrosha|korarathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:korarathmusha|korarathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:korarathyasha|korarathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokorarathnkshĂ«sha|gokorarathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokorarathnkrosha|gokorarathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokorarathnkmusha|gokorarathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokorarathnkyasha|gokorarathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kerĂŠthasha|kerĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kerĂŠthshĂ«sha|kerĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kerĂŠthrosha|kerĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kerĂŠthmusha|kerĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kerĂŠthyasha|kerĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokerĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gokerĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokerĂŠthnkrosha|gokerĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokerĂŠthnkmusha|gokerĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokerĂŠthnkyasha|gokerĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:korfathasha|korfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:korfathshĂ«sha|korfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:korfathrosha|korfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:korfathmusha|korfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:korfathyasha|korfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokorfathnkshĂ«sha|gokorfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokorfathnkrosha|gokorfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokorfathnkmusha|gokorfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokorfathnkyasha|gokorfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
